Lumify
Table of Contents

Class TodoList

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.EF
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

A todo list, either personal or workspace-shared, holding a set of TodoEntry items. Its status is derived from its entries (done when all entries are done). Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

public class TodoList
Inheritance
object
TodoList

Properties

CreatedAt

Creation timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeletedAt

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO-8601 string); null while active.

public string? DeletedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ID

Primary key (GUID string).

public string ID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

IsArchived

Archived flag stored as an integer (0 = active, 1 = archived).

public int IsArchived { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Name

List name.

public string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Owner

The owning user.

public virtual User Owner { get; set; }

Property Value

User

OwnerID

The user who created the list.

public string OwnerID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Status

Status: 1 = pending/open, 2 = done.

public int Status { get; set; }

Property Value

int

TodoEntries

The entries contained in this list.

public virtual ICollection<TodoEntry> TodoEntries { get; set; }

ICollection<TodoEntry>

Last-update timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string UpdatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Workspace

The owning workspace, if any.

Workspace

WorkspaceID

The owning workspace, or null for a personal list.

public string? WorkspaceID { get; set; }
